FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.cardsM: Feiyap cards can now appear in rewards and shops.
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.descri:
A warrior trained in martial arts. With golden eyes, she can see countless versions of herself across parallel worlds.
She enters the Spire to find her destined end.
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.goldMo: This gold could buy a fine coffin.
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.title: Feiyap
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.unlock: Complete a run as [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.victor: After crossing countless worldlines, Feiyap finally reached the end she long sought.
FEIYAP_CHARACTER_FEIYAP_CHARACTER.flavor: Feiyap's journey has not yet written its final chapter.
